final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 3:4 portrait 9-grid layout poster for Xiaohongshu (小红书) content (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a creamy, healing, ins-style aesthetic with light neumorphic illustrations — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a standard 3×3 grid layout (3 columns × 3 rows), each cell must be complete and centered, clear boundaries between cells for easy cutting into 9 single images, generous whitespace, clean magazine-style typography
Subject: must include all 9 grid contents as specified:
  第1格（封面）: 大标题"让你倒头就睡的8个 tips" / 副标题"失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏" / 柔软床铺、月亮、枕头、眼罩等治愈睡眠元素
  第2格: 标题"1. 睡前1小时别玩手机" / 正文"蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。" / 手机、月亮、困倦表情小插画
  第3格: 标题"2. 睡前把灯光调暗" / 正文"暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。" / 床头灯、暖黄色灯光、窗帘
  第4格: 标题"3. 房间温度别太高" / 正文"稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。" / 空调、温度计、被子
  第5格: 标题"4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡" / 正文"咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。" / 咖啡杯、茶杯、禁止符号
  第6格: 标题"5. 睡前洗个热水澡" / 正文"能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。" / 浴室蒸汽、毛巾、热水
  第7格: 标题"6. 脑子停不下来就写下来" / 正文"把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。" / 笔记本、钢笔、小台灯
  第8格: 标题"7. 固定上床时间" / 正文"每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。" / 时钟、月亮、床
  第9格: 标题"8. 试试深呼吸放松法" / 正文"吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。" / 底部小字"收藏这组，今晚试试看" / 呼吸线条、闭眼人物、星星
Scene/backdrop: must include soft sleep-themed elements: pillows, moon, stars, hot milk, aromatherapy, books, eye masks, curtains, beds — arranged appropriately across the 9 cells
Lighting/mood: needs a gentle, soothing, sleep-healing atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be creamy white, light beige, pale oatmeal, light caramel dominant, with dark brown text accents — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a soft, premium, editorial surface treatment — exact paper texture and illustration style is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all Chinese text exactly as specified in each cell above, large readable typography, no English
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must be 3:4 portrait 9-grid layout with clear cell boundaries; each cell must be independently postable; no text near cut lines; premium editorial aesthetic, no cheap marketing feel
Avoid: must avoid cheap marketing vibes, over-decoration, cluttered layouts, garish colors, English text, garbled characters
